title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 3.14.2023
summary:
Main
Time for a breather to digest recent gains - It was only a month ago that market participants were faced with almost zero spot Capesize rates
Source: Breakwave Advisors

BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
March 14, 2023
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,756 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,424 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 69.7% ↑ 30D: 136.5% Momentum: Positive
↑ YTD: 70.9% ↓ YTD: -6.0% Sentiment: Positive
↓ YOY: -42.1% ↓ YOY: -47.3% Fundamentals: Positive
Bi-Weekly Report
• Time for a breather to digest recent gains - It was only a month ago that market participants were faced with
almost zero spot Capesize rates and dark clouds were gathering over the dry bulk market outlook. Whispers of
negative spot rates and zero-strike put options were making the rounds and even the hint of positive talk regarding
the future was immediately thrown out as wishful thinking. Fast forward to today, and optimism is abundant.
